detectors.description:
Reentrancy in Omaum._transfer(address,address,uint256) (Omaum.sol#659-783):
	External calls:
	- swapTokensForEth(contractTokenBalance) (Omaum.sol#723)
		- uniswapV2Router.swapExactTokensForETHSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens(tokenAmount,0,path,address(this),block.timestamp) (Omaum.sol#797-809)
	External calls sending eth:
	- sendETHToFee(address(this).balance) (Omaum.sol#729)
		- _marketingAddress.transfer(amount) (Omaum.sol#817)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (Omaum.sol#781)
		- _rOwned[address(this)] = _rOwned[address(this)].add(rTeam) (Omaum.sol#943)
		- _rOwned[sender] = _rOwned[sender].sub(rAmount) (Omaum.sol#923)
		- _rOwned[recipient] = _rOwned[recipient].add(rTransferAmount) (Omaum.sol#925)
	Omaum._rOwned (Omaum.sol#335) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- Omaum._takeTeam(uint256) (Omaum.sol#937-945)
	- Omaum._transferStandard(address,address,uint256) (Omaum.sol#897-933)
	- Omaum.balanceOf(address) (Omaum.sol#485-489)
	- Omaum.constructor() (Omaum.sol#419-449)
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (Omaum.sol#781)
		- _rTotal = _rTotal.sub(rFee) (Omaum.sol#951)
	Omaum._rTotal (Omaum.sol#347) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- Omaum._getCurrentSupply() (Omaum.sol#1093-1103)
	- Omaum._reflectFee(uint256,uint256) (Omaum.sol#949-955)
	- Omaum.constructor() (Omaum.sol#419-449)
	- Omaum.tokenFromReflection(uint256) (Omaum.sol#581-603)

	- [Omaum.balanceOf(address)](Omaum.sol#L485-L489)
	- [Omaum.constructor()](Omaum.sol#L419-L449)
	- [_tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee)](Omaum.sol#L781)
		- [_rTotal = _rTotal.sub(rFee)](Omaum.sol#L951)
	[Omaum._rTotal](Omaum.sol#L347) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- [Omaum._getCurrentSupply()](Omaum.sol#L1093-L1103)

detectors.description:
Reentrancy in Omaum.transferFrom(address,address,uint256) (Omaum.sol#547-577):
	External calls:
	- _transfer(sender,recipient,amount) (Omaum.sol#557)
		- _marketingAddress.transfer(amount) (Omaum.sol#817)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- _approve(sender,_msgSender(),_allowances[sender][_msgSender()].sub(amount,ERC20: transfer amount exceeds allowance)) (Omaum.sol#559-573)
		- _allowances[owner][spender] = amount (Omaum.sol#651)
	Event emitted after the call(s):
	- Approval(owner,spender,amount) (Omaum.sol#653)
		- _approve(sender,_msgSender(),_allowances[sender][_msgSender()].sub(amount,ERC20: transfer amount exceeds allowance)) (Omaum.sol#559-573)
detectors.markdown:
Reentrancy in [Omaum.transferFrom(address,address,uint256)](Omaum.sol#L547-L577):
	External calls:
	- [_transfer(sender,recipient,amount)](Omaum.sol#L557)
		- [_marketingAddress.transfer(amount)](Omaum.sol#L817)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- [_approve(sender,_msgSender(),_allowances[sender][_msgSender()].sub(amount,ERC20: transfer amount exceeds allowance))](Omaum.sol#L559-L573)
		- [_allowances[owner][spender] = amount](Omaum.sol#L651)
	Event emitted after the call(s):
	- [Approval(owner,spender,amount)](Omaum.sol#L653)
		- [_approve(sender,_msgSender(),_allowances[sender][_msgSender()].sub(amount,ERC20: transfer amount exceeds allowance))](Omaum.sol#L559-L573)
